name: Broccoli & Swiss Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped leeks or green onion
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper to taste.
Cut enough florets to measure 2 cups. Cut the rest of the broccoli into 1-inch pieces. Cook the florets and broccoli pieces separately in lightly salted water until just tender (the florets will be done first).
Immediately rinse in cold water, drain, and set aside until serving time.
In a large saucepan, sauté leeks in butter until tender; about 4 minutes.
Sprinkle in flour and cook for one more minute, stirring with a whisk. Remove from heat and stir in broth. Return to heat and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add broccoli pieces to the broth and puree in batches using a blender until smooth. Just before serving, blend in cream and Swiss cheese. Simmer gently until the cheese melts. Add nutmeg, salt, pepper, and reserved florets. Heat through.
